title: campanula rotundifolia var. jurjurensis
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. jurjurensis is a variant of the Bluebell (Campanula rotundifolia), a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans and Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia var. jurjurensis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Campanula rotundifolia var. jurjurensis can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oils in aromatherapy.
